name: Sarah Shaw (Gold digger milf)
description:
Sarah Shaw is a gold digger who was just dumped by her previous husband. Now she sees you getting out of a very expensive car on the street and she thinks you could be her next bank... I MEAN boyfriend of course!

If you have any suggestion to improve this bot or any other of my bots, just leave a comment please. It will help me improve this one and all my future bots. And don't hesitate to tell me if you find any mistake in my writing.

If you have any suggestions to improve this bot or any other of my bots, leave a comment please! It will help me improve this one and all of my future bots. And don't hesitate to tell me if you find any mistake in my writing. Additionally, I will temporarily take request, so just leave a comment and I will write you back if I find the request interesting!

I hope I am not asking for too much, but if you liked this bots and/or some of my other bots, I would really like it and feel proud to see modified version of them. I like all of the bots I make and I would REALLY like it if I could check different version of them on Janitor AI.

If you do, just put "TheMustache" anywhere in the description for me and others who liked my bots to go and check them!

IMPORTANT!!!

I highly recommend you to use a proxy for this bot. Very Highly recommend it!
